history.content:
<thought>I am at (1,1) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). The path from here is clear: move right twice, then turn down, then move down twice, avoiding lava. So the next action is to move forward one step.</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am currently at position (1,2) facing right (the '>' in the map). The goal is at (3,3). Moving forward to (1,3) is safe (empty cell). From there, I can turn right to face down, then move down two cells to reach the goal, avoiding the lava at (2,2) and (3,2). So my next action should be to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>I am at position (2,3) facing right. The goal is directly below at (4,3). I need to face down to move towards it. Turning right will orient me downwards.</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at (row2, col4) facing down. The goal is directly below at (row4, col4). The path is clear: moving forward will take me to (row3, col4) which is empty floor, and then another move forward to the goal. So I should move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row2, col3) facing down. The goal is directly below at (row3, col3). There are no obstacles in front, so moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
